candidates.title: Darfur’s burned villages become the war’s food map
candidates.why_now: UN officials warned in mid-April that Sudan is entering a fourth year of war with famine confirmed in Darfur and Kordofan, while new reporting and rights documentation describe burned settlements and mass displacement.
candidates.core_question: How are arson, displacement and market disruption turning parts of Sudan’s war into a deliberately engineered hunger crisis?
candidates.angle: Build from satellite/rights evidence and food-supply routes, not a generic anniversary piece or atrocity catalogue.
